stances.key_quote: Some live bets could not be settled due to this disruption and we are refunding those affected.
Critics call this a systemic risk problem, not just a technical glitch.
Users are currently unable to execute crypto trades due to connectivity issues.
Today's outage suggests we need more diversification.
Will this incident accelerate migration to GCP or Azure?
Currently trading at 38% YES following today's incident.
Amazon's stock (AMZN) is down approximately 1.6% today following the US-East-1 outage announcement.
38% YES on another AWS outage before year-end seems too high.
Multi-region deployments with active-active architectures aren't just best practice anymore - they're table stakes.
Multi-region deployments with active-active architectures aren't just best practice anymore - they're table stakes.
Critics call this a systemic risk problem, not just a technical glitch.

topic_defs.label: AWS 单点故障是系统性风险问题
topic_defs.supportive_means: 认为这是 AWS/平台/政策层面的系统性问题，需监管/拆分
topic_defs.opposed_means: 认为这是用户/企业自己 multi-region 没做好，怪 AWS 没道理

topic_defs.label: 应当 true multi-cloud 还是 active multi-region
topic_defs.opposed_means: 认为 multi-region within AWS 已足够

topic_defs.label: Polymarket 38% YES 是有意义的市场共识
topic_defs.supportive_means: 把 38% 当作可信信号去引用
topic_defs.opposed_means: 质疑 38% 背后的流动性/操纵/信号价值

topic_defs.label: AMZN 当日跌 1.6% 是有意义的市场反应
topic_defs.supportive_means: 用 1.6% 论证投资者对 AWS 的担忧
topic_defs.opposed_means: 认为 1.6% 在日内噪音范围内，且当日已部分修复，无信号
